name: Classic Cheeseburger
description: Juicy beef patty with melted American cheese, fresh lettuce, tomato, and special sauce on a toasted bun.

name: Crispy Chicken Sandwich
description: Golden-fried chicken breast with pickles and mayo on a brioche bun.

name: Bacon Cheeseburger
description: A beef patty, four strips of crispy bacon, melted cheese, and tangy BBQ sauce.

name: Spicy Chicken Nuggets (10pc)
description: Crispy breaded chicken pieces with a kick of heat, served with your choice of dipping sauce.

name: Loaded French Fries
description: Crispy fries topped with melted cheese, bacon bits, and green onions.

name: BBQ Pulled Pork Sandwich
description: Slow-cooked pork shoulder smothered in house-made BBQ sauce, served with coleslaw.

name: Fish Fillet Sandwich
description: Beer-battered cod filet with tartar sauce and lettuce on a sesame seed bun.

name: Veggie Burger
description: Plant-based patty with avocado, tomato, and vegan mayo on a whole wheat bun.

name: Chicken Tenders Basket
description: Three crispy chicken tenders served with fries and honey mustard dipping sauce.

name: Breakfast Burrito
description: Scrambled eggs, cheese, potatoes, and choice of bacon or sausage wrapped in a flour tortilla.

name: Philly Cheesesteak
description: Sliced ribeye steak with melted provolone, grilled onions, and peppers on a hoagie roll.

name: Chili Cheese Dog
description: All-beef hot dog topped with homemade chili and shredded cheddar cheese.

name: Buffalo Wings (6pc)
description: Crispy wings tossed in your choice of mild, hot, or BBQ sauce with celery sticks.

name: Mushroom Swiss Burger
description: Beef patty topped with sautéed mushrooms and melted Swiss cheese.

name: Onion Rings
description: Crispy beer-battered onion rings served with ranch dipping sauce.

name: Grilled Chicken Wrap
description: Grilled chicken strips with lettuce, tomato, and Caesar dressing in a spinach tortilla.

name: Nachos Supreme
description: Tortilla chips loaded with cheese, jalapeños, ground beef, sour cream, and guacamole.

name: Classic Hot Dog
description: All-beef frankfurter with ketchup, mustard, and relish on a toasted bun.

name: Avocado Turkey Club
description: Sliced turkey, bacon, avocado, lettuce, and tomato on toasted multigrain bread.

name: Chocolate Milkshake
description: Creamy vanilla ice cream blended with rich chocolate syrup and topped with whipped cream.

name: Pepperoni Classic
description: Our signature pizza with double pepperoni, extra mozzarella, and tangy tomato sauce on a crispy crust.

name: Hawaiian Paradise
description: Sweet pineapple, smoked ham, and mozzarella cheese blend on our garlic butter crust.

name: Supreme Veggie
description: Loaded with bell peppers, mushrooms, red onions, black olives, and fresh tomatoes on whole wheat crust.

name: Quattro Carni
description: A meat lover's dream with four premium meats: spicy pepperoni, Italian sausage, smoked bacon, and honey-glazed ham, topped with mozzarella and Romano cheeses on our signature garlic-tomato sauce.

name: Dragon Roll Platter
description: 8-piece platter featuring eel, cucumber, and avocado topped with thin-sliced avocado in a dragon-scale pattern. Served with soy sauce, wasabi, and pickled ginger.

name: Samurai Sashimi Combo
description: Chef's selection of 15 premium sashimi slices (tuna, salmon, yellowtail) arranged artfully with daikon radish and shiso leaves. Includes miso soup.

name: Tokyo Night Boat
description: Our signature 24-piece sushi boat featuring nigiri, rolls, and tempura. Includes 4 tuna nigiri, 4 salmon nigiri, California rolls, spicy scallop rolls, and 2 tempura shrimp rolls.
